goal: Eliminate manual workflow observation, reconciliation, health classification, transition explanation, bounded-history maintenance, trend interpretation, change preservation, and frequency interpretation while preserving fail-closed automation.
publication_chain: validate-chain-continuation generates and embeds the run receipt
full-validation-chain-report artifact transfers it to build-pages
build-pages publishes and reconciles bounded observation, transition, trend, and change records
build-pages reconciles the trend-change receipt into bounded deduplicated trend-change history
build-pages derives a bounded descriptive frequency and recency summary from trend-change history
verify-public-pages checks observation, health, transition, trend, change-history, and frequency-summary endpoints

trend_change_history_policy.prior_history_unavailable_result: initialize a new bounded sequence without assigning a manual task

cancelled_run_policy: A cancelled run remains fail-closed and the next repository-owned trigger re-evaluates automatically.
external_evidence_policy: Missing external evidence remains deferred under declared owners and does not become a user task.
non_claims: This status proves automation contracts, not a successful future workflow run.
Frequency and recency summaries are bounded and descriptive, not predictive or independently causal.
It does not grant merge, release, deployment, publication, execution, or downstream mutation authority.
